headline: Bernstein sees 1970s-style supercycle for Middle East oil services
summary: Investing.com -- A 1970s-style boom may be forming in Middle Eastern oil services, according to a note from Bernstein analyst Guillaume Delaby on Wednesday.

raw.headline: Bernstein sees 1970s-style supercycle for Middle East oil services

headline: UBS sees limited macro strain from $100 oil vs. 1974 levels
summary: Investing.com -- The global economy is far less vulnerable to an oil price shock today than it was during the crises of the 1970s, according to a note from UBS economist Arend Kapteyn on Wednesday.
